title.en: China-to-Suriname Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入苏里南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入蘇里南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Suriname SSB conformity requirements, EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) energy regulatory context, EBS (N.V. Energiebedrijven Suriname) utility interconnection requirements, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding (60 Hz), IEC 62920 EMC, and 60 Hz 127/220 V grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines. Critical distinction: Suriname operates at 60 Hz (Americas standard), not 50 Hz, requiring inverter reconfiguration and retesting of Chinese 50 Hz-based equipment.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与苏里南SSB合格评定要求、EAS（苏里南能源监管局）能源监管背景、EBS（苏里南能源公司）电网互联要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛（60 Hz）、IEC 62920 EMC及60 Hz 127/220 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。关键区别：苏里南电网运行频率为60 Hz（美洲标准），而非50 Hz，中国50 Hz设备出口须重新配置和测试。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與蘇里南SSB合格評定要求、EAS（蘇里南能源監管局）能源監管背景、EBS（蘇里南能源公司）電網互聯要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島（60 Hz）、IEC 62920 EMC及60 Hz 127/220 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。關鍵區別：蘇里南電網運行頻率為60 Hz（美洲標準），而非50 Hz，中國50 Hz設備出口須重新配置和測試。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SSB conformity scope determination, EAS regulatory approval, EBS interconnection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Suriname SSB technical regulations, EAS energy policy, EBS grid-connection technical requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Suriname's standards and regulatory framework for solar PV is developing; requirements may not be fully codified and should be confirmed directly with EAS and EBS.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SSB合格评定范围裁定、EAS监管批准、EBS并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行苏里南SSB技术法规、EAS能源政策、EBS并网技术要求及项目业主要求。苏里南太阳能光伏标准和监管框架仍在发展中，要求可能尚未完全成文，应直接向EAS和EBS确认。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SSB合格評定範圍裁定、EAS監管批准、EBS併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行蘇里南SSB技術法規、EAS能源政策、EBS併網技術要求及項目業主要求。蘇里南太陽能光伏標準和監管框架仍在發展中，要求可能尚未完全成文，應直接向EAS和EBS確認。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Suriname, the single most critical gap is the grid frequency: Suriname operates at 60 Hz (Americas standard), while Chinese inverters are designed, tested, and certified for 50 Hz grids. This means: (1) anti-islanding protection tested under IEC 62116 at 50 Hz does not satisfy 60 Hz grid requirements — retesting at 60 Hz is required; (2) firmware protection thresholds, reconnection timing, and MPPT parameters validated for Chinese 50 Hz / 220-380 V conditions must be reconfigured and re-documented for Suriname's 60 Hz / 127-220 V grid before installation; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence is required; (4) IEC 62920 EMC evidence must cover the 60 Hz operating configuration; (5) SSB conformity and EBS interconnection approval are the regulatory gates. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are 50 Hz-based and do not satisfy Suriname's IEC-referenced requirements or EBS interconnection conditions.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口苏里南时，最关键的差距是电网频率：苏里南电网运行频率为60 Hz（美洲标准），而中国逆变器按50 Hz电网设计、测试和认证。这意味着：（1）依据IEC 62116在50 Hz下测试的防孤岛保护不满足60 Hz电网要求——须在60 Hz下重新测试；（2）针对中国50 Hz / 220-380 V条件验证的固件保护阈值、重连时序和MPPT参数，须在安装前重新配置并为苏里南60 Hz / 127-220 V电网重新记录；（3）须提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）IEC 62920 EMC证据须涵盖60 Hz运行配置；（5）SSB合格评定和EBS互联批准是监管门槛。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024均基于50 Hz，不满足苏里南IEC参考要求或EBS互联条件。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口蘇里南時，最關鍵的差距是電網頻率：蘇里南電網運行頻率為60 Hz（美洲標準），而中國逆變器按50 Hz電網設計、測試和認證。這意味著：（1）依據IEC 62116在50 Hz下測試的防孤島保護不滿足60 Hz電網要求——須在60 Hz下重新測試；（2）針對中國50 Hz / 220-380 V條件驗證的韌體保護閾值、重連時序和MPPT參數，須在安裝前重新配置並為蘇里南60 Hz / 127-220 V電網重新記錄；（3）須提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）IEC 62920 EMC證據須涵蓋60 Hz運行配置；（5）SSB合格評定和EBS互聯批准是監管門檻。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024均基於50 Hz，不滿足蘇里南IEC參考要求或EBS互聯條件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
